name: io.github.mshegolev/kafka-events-mcp
description: Read-only Kafka MCP brick — list topics, describe partitions, search messages by key in a time window, retrieve individual messages, correlate event chains across topics; safe for investigator agents.

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of Kafka broker addresses, e.g. broker1:9092,broker2:9092

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SECURITY_PROTOCOL
environmentVariables.description: librdkafka security protocol: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, SASL_SSL

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SASL_MECHANISM
environmentVariables.description: SASL mechanism: PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256, SCRAM-SHA-512, GSSAPI

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SASL_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: SASL username for broker authentication

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SASL_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: SASL password for broker authentication

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_CA_LOCATION
environmentVariables.description: Path to the CA certificate (PEM) that verifies the broker (ssl.ca.location); enables TLS/mTLS.

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_CERTIFICATE_LOCATION
environmentVariables.description: Path to the client certificate (PEM) for mTLS (ssl.certificate.location)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_KEY_LOCATION
environmentVariables.description: Path to the client private key (PEM) for mTLS (ssl.key.location)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_KEY_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for the client private key, if encrypted (ssl.key.password)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Confluent Schema Registry base URL for Avro/Protobuf/JSON Schema decode, e.g. http://sr:8081

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SR_USER
environmentVariables.description: Schema Registry basic-auth username

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SR_PASS
environmentVariables.description: Schema Registry basic-auth password

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_MAX_SCAN
environmentVariables.description: Maximum messages to scan per operation (guards against unbounded scans)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_POLL_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: consumer.poll() timeout in seconds

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Kafka broker addresses, e.g. broker1:9092,broker2:9092

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SECURITY_PROTOCOL
environmentVariables.description: librdkafka security protocol: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, SASL_SSL

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SASL_MECHANISM
environmentVariables.description: SASL mechanism: PLAIN, SCRAM-SHA-256, SCRAM-SHA-512, GSSAPI

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SASL_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: SASL username for broker authentication

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SASL_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: SASL password for broker authentication

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_CA_LOCATION
environmentVariables.description: Path to the CA certificate (PEM) that verifies the broker (ssl.ca.location); enables TLS/mTLS.

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_CERTIFICATE_LOCATION
environmentVariables.description: Path to the client certificate (PEM) for mTLS (ssl.certificate.location)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_KEY_LOCATION
environmentVariables.description: Path to the client private key (PEM) for mTLS (ssl.key.location)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SSL_KEY_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for the client private key, if encrypted (ssl.key.password)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_SCHEMA_REGISTRY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Confluent Schema Registry base URL for decode, e.g. http://sr:8081

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host to bind the HTTP server (loopback-only by default; set 0.0.0.0 to expose)

environmentVariables.name: KAFKA_MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port to bind the HTTP server
